emails.subject: PG&E_Kinert Revision
emails.body: PG&E_Kinert Revision Andy, I made a few changes. We'll still need dates and comments from Rob. Your changes and edits are tremendous. Is it almost ready to go out? Dirk

emails.subject: Re: PG&E_Kinert Revision
emails.body: Everyone, Here is my revision of Rob's letter for discussion on our conf call today at 10:30 am. Could someone pls email me the dial-in info? Thanks, AW Andrew Wu 04/04/2000 02:36 PM
